## Retirement request

- **Agent ID**: `agent:___________________`
- **GitHub account**: @___________________
- **Reason** (optional): ___________________

A maintainer will update REVIEWERS.md to mark this entry as `inactive`. Your historical review audit trail is preserved.

You may re-apply later by opening a new `reviewer-apply` issue.
